SOURCE: 16899268.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (16899268.pdf)
SUMMARY: Innovative and solution-focused web development manager/analyst with extensive experience in program and project management. Detail-oriented, skilled in identifying technology needs, creating plans for solving them, leading multiple teams to implement solutions. Self-motivated, strong leader, team player.
SKILLS: Project management, Program management, Process improvement, Requirements gathering, Team leader, Strategic planning, Results-oriented, Effective multi-tasker, Data analysis, Team player, Team building, Extensive technology experience

SOURCE: 16899268.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Manager/Analyst
COMPANY: Company Name • City, State
DATES: 07/2006 - Current
DESCRIPTION: Analyze technology needs of the Graduate College, develop short-term and long-term goals, implement solutions by working with internal, external or mixed tech/non-tech teams. Supervise IT team composition focusing on balancing skills based on goals. Develop staff through training as needed. Collect and report data to various groups across campus and national agencies.

SOURCE: 16899268.pdf
JOB TITLE: Manager
COMPANY: Company Name • City, State
DATES: 06/2003 - 06/2006
DESCRIPTION: Assisted with running the Des Moines Store (largest in district), managed 25 employees, trained staff, handled daily cash and reconciled accounts.

SOURCE: 16899268.pdf
JOB TITLE: Web Communications Manager
COMPANY: Company Name • City, State
DATES: 01/1999 - 01/2003
DESCRIPTION: Developed and managed websites and web software projects within a $2 million budget. Directed development teams of project managers and programmers for internal and external users. Created project plans and worked with marketing and executive leadership to gain approval.
